# SDKs

Livepeer SDKs 可用于不同平台和用例：

<CardGroup cols={2}>
  <Card title="Livepeer Studio SDKs" icon="video" href="/solutions/livepeer-studio/reference/sdks" arrow>
    TypeScript, Go, Python, and React SDKs for Livepeer Studio API
  </Card>
  <Card title="Network SDKs" icon="network-wired" href="/v2/cn/developers/technical-references/sdks" arrow>
    SDKs for direct interaction with the Livepeer Network
  </Card>
</CardGroup>

## Livepeer Studio SDKs

用于构建使用 Livepeer Studio（托管平台）的应用程序：

- **服务器 SDKs**: TypeScript/JavaScript, Go, Python
- **React 组件**: Player 和 Broadcast 组件
- **完整文档**: [Livepeer Studio SDKs](/solutions/livepeer-studio/reference/sdks)

## 网络 SDKs

直接与 Livepeer 网络交互：

- 针对特定网络的 SDK 和工具
- 查看 [网络 SDK](/v2/cn/developers/technical-references/sdks) 以获取详细信息
